name: brew_rest_site
description: WeatheredKit's Brew rest-site option: offered with the label 'Brew', removes a card from the deck (10 -> 9), and grants a potion reward you claim

checks.note: jump straight to a rest site (skips Neow, full 10-card deck)
Brew is offered with the right label
removing a card drops the deck to 9 and opens the potion reward
see and claim the brewed potion
